calendar.matters:
Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiff's Motion for Apportionment proceedings & for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: E. Estacio, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Sarah Ivory, Atty. for Plaintiff: Kathleen Freedman, present.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court Granted Plaintiff's motion.
Apportionment as follows:
Kathleen Freedman - 65 %
Debrah Dimicelli - 17.5 %
Sharon Looby - 17.5 %
Robert Freedman - 0 %
Scott Freddman - 0 %

ORDER signed in open court.
